title: Research & Definitions
description: Understanding the problem, the users, and the product goals before building anything.

title: UX/UI Research
description: Analyzing user behavior and shaping intuitive flows and interface structures.

title: Prototyping & Validation
description: Testing ideas through wireframes and prototypes to validate usability early.

title: Architecture
description: Designing the technical foundation, data structure, and scalable system architecture.

title: Development
description: Building the product with modern technologies and clean, maintainable code.

title: Delivery
description: Deploying, monitoring, and refining the product in real-world environments.
